raw_consumer_statement: It appears that this company created a fake agreement under the name XXXX XXXX in XXXXXXXX XXXX  XXXX, of which we have no knowledge. They attempted to fraudulently bill our credit card on XX/XX/XXXX, which we caught and reported to Citibank. The merchant is asking Citibank to have someone log in to this account, which can not be done because it would activate an account and initiate an acceptance of their terms. This merchant uses a third-party company that recaptures disputed accounts by bombarding credit card issuers with nonsensical documentation, leading them to fictitiously believe that there was an actual agreement set up with the merchant, which there never was. Even in this case, the documentation provided to the merchant by this third-party company, and then forwarded to the credit card issuer, Citibank, did not even provide a username. They are very careful not to overstep the law by putting the account in the actual credit card holders name.
